name: Judge mode — connect with demo tenant without credentials

planSteps.description: The heading 'Connect Foundry Gateway' is visible
A judge/evaluator option is visible containing the text 'No TrueFoundry account?'
Click the button 'Continue as judge — use demo tenant'
Within 60 seconds, the inventory browser appears: the heading 'Foundry inventory' is visible (the connect form is replaced)
The label 'demo tenant (judge mode)' is visible, indicating the inventory came from the demo tenant
